claude_cli.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode dontAsk --tools Read,Grep,Glob --disallowedTools Bash,Edit,Write,MultiEdit,NotebookEdit --output-format json

findings.title: validation_error_mapping_ref early guard is transitive rather than bespoke
findings.summary: Claude confirmed the full S13 result is asserted before consumption, so the ordering requirement is met. A bespoke early guard would only add symmetry with the failClosedOn reason and is deferred.

findings.title: blank audit_event_ref and missing validation_error_mapping_ref could have dedicated negative tests
findings.summary: The code and result validators already enforce these fields, and negative loops cover the S13 marker, denied decision, missing receipt, unsafe claims, and unknown claims. Extra one-field tests are optional hardening and deferred.

required_followups: Continue with RP00.P02.M03.S15 Approval-required routing as the next subphase.
review_notes: Claude confirmed the S14 metadata-only review-required routing logic, validators, fixture parity, fail-closed claim handling, and S15 successor behavior.
S14 does not complete RP00.P02.M03 and hands off to RP00.P02.M03.S15.
There were no P0, P1, or P2 findings.
parsed_review.summary: Claude reported PASS / GO with two optional P3 guard/test granularity observations. After adjudication S14 is PASS_WITH_FINDINGS / GO with no unresolved P0/P1/P2.

raw_claude_cli_result_summary.summary: Claude returned PASS / GO with two optional P3 guard/test granularity observations.
